questions.question_text: Discuss the historical significance of the Lahore Resolution in the context of the Pakistan Movement.
Evaluate the impact of the 18th Amendment on the governance and political structure of Pakistan.
Analyze the role of women in the socio-economic development of Pakistan since independence.
What are the key challenges faced by Pakistan in achieving its Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)?
Examine the historical and contemporary relations between Pakistan and India, focusing on key issues.
Critically assess the role of the military in Pakistan's politics since 1947.
Discuss the significance of CPEC (China-Pakistan Economic Corridor) for Pakistan's economy and regional connectivity.
Analyze the impact of climate change on Pakistan’s agriculture and water resources.
What are the implications of youth population demographics on Pakistan's future development?
Evaluate the state of human rights in Pakistan, considering various socio-political factors.
